customerQuery: I need help tracking my order
my order is delayed from logistics partner
originalDraft: Hi, I'm sorry for the trouble with your order. Tracking updates from the logistics partner can sometimes take time to appear because carrier scans may be delayed. Please check the tracking link in your shipping email or your order history page for the latest status. If the tracking still does not update or the delivery remains delayed, our support team can review the shipment details and help with the next step.
finalResponse:
